## Summary

Describe the change.

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] Windows app launched manually, if UI behavior changed
- [ ] Windows build tested, if packaging changed

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, real `.env` files, generated sessions, or local personal paths are committed
- [ ] User-visible behavior changes are documented
- [ ] macOS support is not claimed unless tested
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes are described
